scene_summary: A corporate stand-up meeting where a nervous presenter tries to justify missing Q1 targets by blaming 'February' and 'runway constraints,' while the cold boss, a sycophantic assistant, and an earnest intern react.

observations.likely_role: VP of Operations / quarterly accountability owner
signature_lines: to re-anchor the team here, right? And just quickly spotlight that.
End of quarter is tomorrow, right? 100%
observations.interpersonal_note: holds everyone to quarterly benchmarks; treats February as a structural headwind rather than addressing root causes
